summary:
Swapped the counter increment to Redis’s atomic `INCR`, so concurrent requests no longer stomp each other.  
- Updated `app/counter.js:7-15` to remove the read/modify/write pattern and rely on `client.incr`, keeping the log but reflecting the new workflow. This avoids race conditions that were dropping increments under load.

Tests: `./test.sh` (pass)

You might next: 1) Add a regression test that stresses the endpoint with varying concurrency levels.
